about.metaDescription: How LA MESA dinners work: limited seats, advance payment to confirm, themes, sponsors, and guest speakers.
about.title: How it works
about.introLead: LA MESA brings together a small group of qualified professionals around one theme, for one dinner in Guadalajara.
about.introBody: Access is by invitation, after joining the waitlist. Each evening is designed for meaningful conversation — not surface-level networking.

seats.a: By design. A smaller table ensures everyone takes part in the conversation. LA MESA prioritizes quality of exchange over headcount.

payment.q: How do I confirm my seat?
payment.a: Once invited, you must pay for your meal in advance to secure your place. If payment is not received within the stated deadline, the seat is released and offered to someone else.

price.q: How much does it cost — and who pays?
price.a: The price varies from one event to another and is stated at invitation time. On average, expect between MXN $700 and $1,500. It generally includes starter, main course, and dessert; drinks are usually not included and are settled on site. Each guest pays for their own seat (except special cases, such as a complimentary dinner under a sponsorship).

absence.q: What if I can’t make it at the last minute?
absence.a: Let us know as soon as you can. If you cancel more than 48 hours before the event, your payment is refunded or kept as credit toward a future event. If you cancel within 48 hours, the payment is retained in full.

themes.a: Yes. Dinner topics are shaped from waitlist profiles — especially industry, role in a company, and expertise. That’s why completing your profile matters: the fuller it is, the better we can invite you to a table aligned with your background and interests.

sponsors.a: Yes, sometimes — and it is clearly stated at invitation time. Sponsorship is designed to benefit members (complimentary dinners, gifts, and similar), while preserving the quality of the moment for everyone at the table.

speakers.q: Is there sometimes a guest speaker?
speakers.a: Sometimes. Certain dinners feature a guest aligned with the theme. Their profile is shared when you register for that specific evening.

join.q: How do I join the list?
join.a: Sign up via the waitlist form. We contact you when a dinner matches your profile and interests.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteHint: Deactivates your waitlist profile and deletes your sign-in account. Your participation history is kept for admin purposes. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: This is permanent: your profile will be deactivated and your account deleted. Confirm?
settings.requiresRecentLogin: For security, please sign in again and retry deleting your account.
